name: Home Assistant
description: Control your Home Assistant instance from Chatons

tools.name: homeassistant_list_entities
tools.label: List HA Entities
tools.description: List all entities (or filter by domain) from Home Assistant. Domains include: light, switch, sensor, binary_sensor, climate, cover, media_player, automation, script, scene, fan, lock, vacuum, camera, etc.
tools.promptSnippet: Use homeassistant_list_entities to discover available devices and sensors.

domain.description: Optional domain filter (e.g. light, switch, sensor, climate, cover, media_player)

tools.name: homeassistant_get_entity_state
tools.label: Get HA Entity State
tools.description: Get the current state and attributes of a Home Assistant entity.
tools.promptSnippet: Use homeassistant_get_entity_state to check the state of a specific device or sensor.

tools.name: homeassistant_call_service
tools.label: Call HA Service
tools.description: Call a Home Assistant service to control devices. Common services: light.turn_on, light.turn_off, switch.turn_on, switch.turn_off, climate.set_temperature, cover.open_cover, cover.close_cover, media_player.media_play, media_player.media_pause, scene.turn_on, automation.trigger, script.turn_on, lock.lock, lock.unlock, fan.turn_on, fan.turn_off.
tools.promptSnippet: Use homeassistant_call_service to control devices (turn on/off lights, set temperature, etc.).
promptGuidelines: Always list entities first to discover valid entity_ids before calling services.
The service format is domain.action (e.g. light.turn_on).
service_data is optional and depends on the service (e.g. {"brightness": 255} for light.turn_on).

service_data.description: Optional service data (e.g. {"brightness": 255, "color_name": "red"} for lights, {"temperature": 22} for climate)

tools.name: homeassistant_get_history
tools.label: Get HA Entity History
tools.description: Get state history of a Home Assistant entity for a time period.
tools.promptSnippet: Use homeassistant_get_history to check past states of a sensor or device.

entity_id.description: Entity ID to get history for

hours.description: Number of hours of history to retrieve (default: 24, max: 168)
